title: New Whitepaper Highlights the Role of QR Codes in Driving Instant Payments Adoption
excerpt: Matera, partnering with Amazon Web Services (AWS), unveiled its newest whitepaper titled "QR Codes & The Instant Payments Imperative." This complimentary report examines how QR codes
body:
Matera, partnering with Amazon Web Services (AWS), unveiled its newest whitepaper titled "QR Codes & The Instant Payments Imperative."

This complimentary report examines how QR codes transform payment systems, help organizations cut expenses, and let consumers withdraw directly from bank accounts. Given increasing demands to upgrade payment infrastructure and meet shifting consumer needs, the paper positions QR codes as a critical factor in elevating instant payments as America's dominant transaction method.

"QR codes offer accessible innovation enabling businesses and banks to embrace instant payments—delivering greater speed, productivity, and savings," explained Matera's Carlos Netto, Chief Executive Officer. "Adopting this technology allows enterprises to consolidate payment approaches, optimize workflows, and decrease expenditures while giving consumers sought-after frictionless experiences."

## Whitepaper Key Points

- **QR Code Payment Functions:** Understanding how QR codes enable secure, smooth digital monetary exchanges
- **Moving Beyond "Pull" Toward "Push" Models:** How this shift enhances productivity and minimizes costs
- **Creating Unified Standards:** Why consistent standards matter for expanding implementation
- **NFC Technology Integration:** How NFC works alongside QR codes for seamless consumer experiences

Instant payments could become America's primary transaction method, contingent on one essential ingredient: payment QR codes. The paper investigates how this technology can propel U.S. markets toward swifter, improved, and economical exchanges.

Download the whitepaper [here](https://insight.matera.com/aws-qr-codes-pr).
